channel.title: Sharing on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Sharing on Pi Stack

item.title: PasswordPusher vs PrivateBin vs Bitwarden Send: Best Self-Hosted Password Sharing 2026
item.description: Sharing passwords, API keys, and other sensitive credentials over email or chat is a security risk that most teams still practice daily. Self-hosted password sharing tools solve this problem by letting you send time-limited, view-limited links that self-destruct after reading — with zero trace on any third-party server.
